Tokenomics

Dogemars tokenomics feature a deflationary model with a fixed supply, encouraging scarcity. A percentage of each transaction is redistributed to social media marketing, boosting community engagement. Additionally, a portion goes to liquidity to ensure stability and facilitate trading. Embracing the meme culture, Dogemars aims to create a fun and vibrant ecosystem.

How To Buy

Create a Wallet

Download metamask or your wallet of choice from the app store or google play store for free. Desktop users, download the google chrome extension by going to metamask.io.

Get Some ETH

Have ETH in your wallet to switch to $MARS. If you don’t have any ETH, you can buy directly on metamask, transfer from another wallet, or buy on another exchange and send it to your wallet.

Go to Uniswap

Connect to Uniswap. Go to app.uniswap.org in google chrome or on the browser inside your Metamask app. Connect your wallet. Paste the $MARS token address into Uniswap, select DogeMars, and confirm. When Metamask prompts you for a wallet signature, sign.

Switch ETH for $MARS

Switch ETH for $MARS. We have very low taxes so you don’t need to worry about buying with a specific slippage, although you may need to use slippage during times of market volatility.
